original_image_tags: scan of the back of a document page. The paper is light brown/tan, showing age. A brown tape or hinge strip is affixed vertically along the left edge. Two dark, circular hole-punch marks are visible near the bottom edge. Faint, reversed text from the document's front side is visible through the paper.

elements.description: A rectangular blue ink stamp in the upper right corner reading 'RECEIVED JUL 7 10 54 AM INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I. DEPT. OF JUST'.
A vertical strip of yellowed adhesive tape attached to the left margin.
Faint, illegible reverse-side text showing through the paper.
Two dark, irregularly shaped hole-punch marks or tears at the bottom center of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual elements: a page with aged paper, vertical tape/hinge strip, two hole-punch marks at bottom, and faint reversed text showing through, with no contradictory claims about object counts, categories, or quoted text.
